title: Enterprise Production Hardening — API Contracts
description: Security headers, readiness, and redaction endpoint contracts for spec 005.

security_headers.description: Required response headers on every /api/* response

Permissions-Policy.note: microphone=(self) allows voice chat on app origin only. microphone=() (deny-all) is incorrect and breaks voice.

Content-Security-Policy.note: Backend API only — serves JSON, no HTML. Vite/nginx/Vercel serve the React SPA with their own CSP.

X-Request-ID.description: Echo of incoming X-Request-ID or server-generated UUID. Used for request correlation (FR-027).

GET /api/health.description: Liveness probe — always 200 if process is running
GET /api/health.notes: Never returns 503. Use /api/readiness for dependency checks.

GET /api/readiness.description: Readiness probe — 503 when required production dependencies are unavailable

openai.detail: OpenAI API key is not configured.

GET /api/readiness.notes: Component detail strings MUST NOT contain secrets, API keys, or raw configuration values.

POST /api/voice_export/redact.description: Backend-authoritative redaction — returns redacted transcript without generating audio

response_200.redacted: boolean — true if any substitution was made

redaction_invariants.description: Rules that must hold at all application boundaries
rules: All text inputs MUST be stripped of leading/trailing whitespace before processing
All text sent to LLM calls (retrieval_question, answer_instruction, context chunks) MUST pass through guardrail engine
Retrieval queries MUST NOT contain answer-language instructions (retrieval_question vs answer_instruction are separate)
All transcript export artifacts MUST pass through build_redacted_transcript before serialization
All audio synthesis inputs MUST pass through redact_sensitive_text before TTS submission
Audit log payloads MUST NOT contain raw prompt bodies, document content, or credential values
HTTP error responses MUST NOT contain exception messages, stack traces, or provider payloads

guardrail_coverage_matrix.description: Which guardrail function covers which text surface

export_limits.notes: Audio at 128kbps MP3 ≈ 1 MB/min; 4 min ≈ 4 MB, just under Vercel limit. async mode activates automatically for production deployments via _should_defer_export().
